title: Sign PDF Online — Add Signature Offline
h1: Digitally Sign PDF Documents Without Uploading
description: Draw, type, or upload your signature and apply it to PDF documents entirely in your browser. Great for users in Bangkok.

sections.title: Why Sign PDFs Locally?
sections.content: Your signature is your identity. Never upload your signature image or private document to a cloud signing service.

steps.title: Create Signature
steps.description: Draw, type, or upload your signature image.

steps.title: Place on Document
steps.description: Drag your signature to the right position on the page.

sections.title: Digital Signatures for Bangkok Users
sections.content: Freelancers and businesses in Bangkok sign contracts and agreements with full privacy using our offline tool.

sections.title: Your Signature Stays on Your Device
sections.content: Your drawn signature and the signed document are processed entirely in browser memory — never transmitted.

sections.title: Sign Documents in Under 30 Seconds
sections.content: No account creation, no cloud upload — just open, sign, and download in seconds.

faqs.q: How can I create my signature?
faqs.a: Draw with your mouse, type your name in a signature font, or upload an image.
Yes, place your signature on any or all pages.
Our tool applies a visual signature. For legally binding e-signatures, check your jurisdiction.
Yes, drag the corners to resize it after placing.
